name: Prawns with Chimichurri Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 to 10 cloves garlic, peeled and coarsely chopped
1 Red jalapeno pepper, stemmed and seeded, then coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the garlic sauce: In a food processor, finely mince the garlic and jalapeno. Add the oregano and parsley, pulsing to a fine chop. Gradually add the vinegar, olive oil, and salt, processing until smooth and emulsified.
2. Cook the prawns: Preheat a charcoal or gas grill. Place the prawns on an oiled grate, about 4 to 6 inches from the heat source. Baste with the chimichurri sauce and cook for about 3 to 4 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
3. Serve: Remove about 1/3 of the sauce to use as a basting brush for the prawns. Serve the remaining sauce on the side.
Note: The sauce can also be used with beef, chicken, or pork.
